value.found_quote: `capabilities.experimental['claude/channel/permission']` | `object` | Optional. Always `{}`. Declares that this channel can receive permission relay requests. When declared, Claude Code forwards tool approval prompts to your channel so you can approve or deny them remotely. See [Relay permission prompts](#relay-permission-prompts).
value.rationale: The page describes a permission relay capability (`claude/channel/permission`) that forwards tool approval prompts to a channel so users can approve or deny them remotely, matching the claim. The page also notes channels are in research preview requiring Claude Code v2.1.80+.
